_comment: Source URLs for this skill's reference files. Run scripts/update-references.py to refresh.

references/settings-schema.md.covers: Complete settings.json schema — all top-level keys, permission settings, sandbox settings, worktree settings, global config keys, attribution settings

references/permissions.md.covers: Permission rule syntax, permission modes, tool-specific rules (Bash wildcards, Read/Edit paths, WebFetch domains, MCP, Agent), working directories, managed settings

references/hooks.md.covers: All hook events, matcher patterns, handler types (command/http/prompt/agent), JSON input/output formats, exit codes, event-specific examples

references/mcp.md.covers: MCP server configuration format, transport types (stdio/sse/http), managed MCP configuration, mcpServers fields
